docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2026 BY BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER LAURENTE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PANTHEON SYSTEM, INC. IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) RACHEL JARIS FILED BY DEFENDANT PANTHEON SYSTEMS, INC.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAURENTE, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT PANTHEON SYSTEMS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAURENTE, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PANTHEON SYSTEMS, INC. $1,935.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,025.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
